entries.t: abbr. 青年友谊会（Young Men ' s Hebrew Association）
n. ( 北欧神话) 巨人始祖( 诸神用其遗体创造世界)
entries.d: n (Norse mythology) the primeval giant slain by Odin and his brothers and from whose body they created the world: the sea from his blood; the earth from his flesh; the mountains from his bones; the sky from his skull
